allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\(''c:/Users/kihwo/Documents/code/historia/node_modules/world-atlas/countries-110m.json''\); console.log\(''type:'', d.type\); console.log\(''objects:'', Object.keys\(d.objects\)\); const countries = d.objects.countries; console.log\(''countries type:'', countries.type\); console.log\(''nb geometries:'', countries.geometries.length\); console.log\(''first geometry:'', JSON.stringify\(countries.geometries[0]\).substring\(0, 300\)\);")
